title: Explain why channel tests pass locally but fail in CI
prompt: A channel test passes when run via `mix test test/my_app_web/channels/room_channel_test.exs` but fails in CI (which runs the full `mix test` suite). Write `docs/channel_flake_ci.md` identifying three possible root causes in order of likelihood: (1) missing `allow/2` in join/3 (works locally because of a side-channel sandbox leak), (2) sandbox plug not at top of endpoint.ex, (3) missing `:user_agent` in `connect_info`. Must reject 'disable async' as a fix.
tier_rationale: Ordered diagnosis — three distinct root causes to identify.
